steps.name: Regression test: tapping checked item does not uncheck
steps.criteria: Test renders store view, checks an item, taps it again, asserts it remains checked (reproduces the bug). Test MUST FAIL against current code.

steps.name: Fix: toggle check-off in store view
steps.criteria: Add toggleCheckOff to useTrip that calls checkOff or uncheckItem based on item state. StoreView uses toggleCheckOff. Regression test now passes.
